expectations.text: Test file has a describe() block with a meaningful name
Uses cy.intercept() to mock API calls
Sets localStorage auth token before visiting the page
expectations.evidence: win.localStorage.setItem('auth', JSON.stringify({ token: 'fake-jwt-token' })); in beforeEach before cy.visit()

expectations.text: Sets localStorage student data (aluno) before visiting
expectations.evidence: win.localStorage.setItem('aluno', JSON.stringify(mockStudent)); in beforeEach before cy.visit()

expectations.text: Stubs HTMLMediaElement.prototype.play to avoid autoplay errors
Clicks a play/start button to begin the game
expectations.evidence: cy.get('img[alt="play"]').click(); used in multiple tests to start the game
cy.visit('/nivel1/animais/jogo'); used in multiple beforeEach blocks
